notes: ADR-082 PM-2504: Prime-epoch counter. Advance via scripts/epoch-advance.mjs. Feature unlocks at prime epochs per CANONICAL_UNLOCKS.

gft_rg.description: GFT Wetterich-equation running parameters sampled at current epoch prime scale k = k0 * p^{-sigma}.

running_vacuum.description: Running cosmological constant Λ(H) and Newton constant G(H) from Reuter-Weyer NGFP fixed point.
